examples.title: Navigable link rows
examples.description: Passing `href` turns the `title` snippet into an `<a>`, making the whole row a navigable link.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { DataList } from '@lostgradient/cinder/data-list';
  import { StackedListItem } from '@lostgradient/cinder/stacked-list-item';

  const docs = [
    { id: 'getting-started', name: 'Getting started', href: '#getting-started' },
    { id: 'theming', name: 'Theming', href: '#theming' },
    { id: 'accessibility', name: 'Accessibility', href: '#accessibility' },
  ];
</script>

<DataList items={docs} key={(doc) => doc.id}>
  {#snippet children(doc)}
    <StackedListItem href={doc.href}>
      {#snippet title()}{doc.name}{/snippet}
    </StackedListItem>
  {/snippet}
</DataList>

examples.title: Basic row
examples.description: A minimal StackedListItem with the required `title` snippet and a `meta` snippet, mounted inside the DataList container it is designed to compose with.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { DataList } from '@lostgradient/cinder/data-list';
  import { StackedListItem } from '@lostgradient/cinder/stacked-list-item';

  const members = [
    { id: 'alice', name: 'Alice Chen', role: 'Engineer' },
    { id: 'bob', name: 'Bob Osei', role: 'Designer' },
    { id: 'carol', name: 'Carol Mwangi', role: 'Product' },
  ];
</script>

<DataList items={members} key={(member) => member.id}>
  {#snippet children(member)}
    <StackedListItem>
      {#snippet title()}{member.name}{/snippet}
      {#snippet meta()}{member.role}{/snippet}
    </StackedListItem>
  {/snippet}
</DataList>

examples.title: With description and leading icon
examples.description: A richer row pairing a `leading` visual (here a StatusDot) with a `title` and a secondary `description` snippet below it.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { DataList } from '@lostgradient/cinder/data-list';
  import { StackedListItem } from '@lostgradient/cinder/stacked-list-item';
  import { StatusDot } from '@lostgradient/cinder/status-dot';

  const services = [
    {
      id: 'api',
      name: 'API gateway',
      detail: 'All regions healthy',
      status: 'online' as const,
      statusLabel: 'Online',
    },
    {
      id: 'db',
      name: 'Primary database',
      detail: 'Replication lag 1.2s',
      status: 'warning' as const,
      statusLabel: 'Warning',
    },
    {
      id: 'cache',
      name: 'Cache cluster',
      detail: 'Node 3 unreachable',
      status: 'error' as const,
      statusLabel: 'Error',
    },
  ];
</script>

<DataList items={services} key={(service) => service.id}>
  {#snippet children(service)}
    <StackedListItem>
      {#snippet leading()}
        <StatusDot status={service.status} label={service.statusLabel} />
      {/snippet}
      {#snippet title()}{service.name}{/snippet}
      {#snippet description()}{service.detail}{/snippet}
    </StackedListItem>
  {/snippet}
</DataList>
